title: inula oligocephala
intro: Inula oligocephala, also known as the small-headed elecampane or Asian elecampane, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Inula oligocephala include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Inula oligocephala can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
